tesda_unit_of_competency: Describe daily routines, schedules and plans in Spanish.

roots.example_es: Me despierto a las seis todos los días.
roots.example_en: I wake up at six every day.
roots.example_fil: Nagigising ako ng alas-seis araw-araw.

roots.example_es: Me levanto temprano para ir a clase.
roots.example_en: I get up early to go to class.
roots.example_fil: Maaga akong bumabangon para pumasok sa klase.

roots.example_es: Me ducho antes del desayuno.
roots.example_en: I shower before breakfast.
roots.example_fil: Naliligo ako bago mag-almusal.

roots.example_es: Me visto rápido porque siempre tengo prisa.
roots.example_en: I get dressed quickly because I am always in a hurry.
roots.example_fil: Mabilis akong nagbibihis dahil lagi akong nagmamadali.

roots.example_es: Por la noche me acuesto a las diez.
roots.example_en: At night I go to bed at ten.
roots.example_fil: Sa gabi natutulog ako ng alas-diyes.

roots.example_es: Makati es una ciudad muy moderna.
roots.example_en: Makati is a very modern city.
roots.example_fil: Ang Makati ay isang napaka-modernong lungsod.

roots.example_es: Camino por la calle hasta la oficina.
roots.example_en: I walk along the street to the office.
roots.example_fil: Naglalakad ako sa kalye papunta sa opisina.

roots.example_es: Trabajo en una oficina en el centro.
roots.example_en: I work in an office downtown.
roots.example_fil: Nagtatrabaho ako sa isang opisina sa sentro.

roots.example_es: Mi madre va al mercado los sábados.
roots.example_en: My mother goes to the market on Saturdays.
roots.example_fil: Tuwing Sabado pumupunta ang aking ina sa palengke.

roots.example_es: Espero el autobús en la parada cerca de casa.
roots.example_en: I wait for the bus at the stop near home.
roots.example_fil: Naghihintay ako ng bus sa hintuan malapit sa bahay.

roots.example_es: ¿Qué hora es? Es la una de la tarde.
roots.example_en: What time is it? It is one in the afternoon.
roots.example_fil: Anong oras na? Ala-una na ng hapon.

roots.example_es: Por la mañana desayuno y leo un poco.
roots.example_en: In the morning I have breakfast and read a little.
roots.example_fil: Sa umaga nag-aalmusal ako at nagbabasa nang kaunti.

roots.example_es: Por la tarde voy a estudiar en la biblioteca.
roots.example_en: In the afternoon I am going to study in the library.
roots.example_fil: Sa hapon mag-aaral ako sa aklatan.

roots.example_es: Por la noche ceno con mi familia.
roots.example_en: At night I have dinner with my family.
roots.example_fil: Sa gabi naghahapunan ako kasama ang aking pamilya.

roots.example_es: Mi horario de clases empieza a las ocho.
roots.example_en: My class schedule starts at eight.
roots.example_fil: Nagsisimula ng alas-otso ang iskedyul ng aking klase.

sessions.theme: 2.3 Days, months and prepositions of time

roots.example_es: Trabajo de lunes a viernes cada semana.
roots.example_en: I work from Monday to Friday every week.
roots.example_fil: Nagtatrabaho ako mula Lunes hanggang Biyernes bawat linggo.

roots.example_es: El lunes voy a empezar un curso de español.
roots.example_en: On Monday I am going to start a Spanish course.
roots.example_fil: Sa Lunes magsisimula ako ng kursong Espanyol.

roots.example_es: En el mes de mayo hay muchas fiestas en Filipinas.
roots.example_en: In the month of May there are many fiestas in the Philippines.
roots.example_fil: Sa buwan ng Mayo, maraming pista sa Pilipinas.

roots.example_es: Este año voy a aprender mucho español.
roots.example_en: This year I am going to learn a lot of Spanish.
roots.example_fil: Sa taong ito marami akong matututuhang Espanyol.

roots.example_es: ¿Cuál es la fecha de hoy? Es el doce de junio.
roots.example_en: What is today's date? It is the twelfth of June.
roots.example_fil: Ano ang petsa ngayon? Ika-labindalawa ng Hunyo.

sessions.theme: 2.4 Common actions in the present (regular and irregular)

roots.example_es: Siempre desayuno arroz y un huevo.
roots.example_en: I always have rice and an egg for breakfast.
roots.example_fil: Lagi akong nag-aalmusal ng kanin at itlog.

roots.example_es: Como con mis compañeros a mediodía.
roots.example_en: I eat with my coworkers at noon.
roots.example_fil: Kumakain ako kasama ang aking mga kasamahan tuwing tanghali.

roots.example_es: Salgo de casa a las siete de la mañana.
roots.example_en: I leave the house at seven in the morning.
roots.example_fil: Umaalis ako ng bahay ng alas-siyete ng umaga.

roots.example_es: Vuelvo a casa a las seis de la tarde.
roots.example_en: I come back home at six in the evening.
roots.example_fil: Umuuwi ako ng alas-seis ng hapon.

roots.example_es: Estudio español dos horas cada día.
roots.example_en: I study Spanish two hours every day.
roots.example_fil: Nag-aaral ako ng Espanyol nang dalawang oras araw-araw.

roots.example_es: Siempre me lavo los dientes después de comer.
roots.example_en: I always brush my teeth after eating.
roots.example_fil: Lagi akong nagsisipilyo pagkatapos kumain.

roots.example_es: Nunca me acuesto antes de las nueve.
roots.example_en: I never go to bed before nine.
roots.example_fil: Hindi ako kailanman natutulog bago mag-alas-nuwebe.

roots.example_es: A veces me levanto tarde los domingos.
roots.example_en: Sometimes I get up late on Sundays.
roots.example_fil: Kung minsan huli akong gumigising tuwing Linggo.

roots.example_es: Con frecuencia voy al parque por la tarde.
roots.example_en: I often go to the park in the afternoon.
roots.example_fil: Madalas akong pumunta sa parke sa hapon.

roots.example_es: Todos los días me despierto temprano y hago ejercicio.
roots.example_en: Every day I wake up early and exercise.
roots.example_fil: Araw-araw maaga akong gumigising at nag-eehersisyo.

roots.example_es: Mañana voy a visitar a mis abuelos en Cavite.
roots.example_en: Tomorrow I am going to visit my grandparents in Cavite.
roots.example_fil: Bukas dadalawin ko ang aking mga lolo't lola sa Cavite.

roots.example_es: Mi plan es estudiar español y luego viajar.
roots.example_en: My plan is to study Spanish and then travel.
roots.example_fil: Ang plano ko ay mag-aral ng Espanyol at pagkatapos maglakbay.

roots.example_es: El fin de semana voy a descansar con mi familia.
roots.example_en: On the weekend I am going to rest with my family.
roots.example_fil: Sa katapusan ng linggo magpapahinga ako kasama ang aking pamilya.

roots.example_es: La próxima semana vamos a empezar un proyecto nuevo.
roots.example_en: Next week we are going to start a new project.
roots.example_fil: Sa susunod na linggo magsisimula kami ng bagong proyekto.

roots.example_es: Quiero aprender español porque voy a trabajar en el extranjero.
roots.example_en: I want to learn Spanish because I am going to work abroad.
roots.example_fil: Gusto kong matuto ng Espanyol dahil magtatrabaho ako sa ibang bansa.
